rationale: Educ. Code §21.414 governs a classroom supply reimbursement program for teachers. It has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions or school district property tax revenue, so no conflict arises.
quote: The commissioner shall establish a reimbursement program under which the commissioner provides funds to a school district for the purpose of reimbursing classroom teachers in the district who expend personal funds on classroom supplies.
_note: No textual or operational nexus between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this classroom supply reimbursement statute.
